series_metadata.series_description: Monthly breakdown of student’s hours from private, vocational, and institutional schools to the Board. Series also includes monthly reports of attendance and hours for private and institutional barber schools transferred on 01/21/2018 from series authorization #50040005, agency series 877008. As of 01/21/2018 the State Cosmetology and Barber Board processes and retains all records from the Ohio State Barber Board per the enactment of H.B. 49.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned. ; Electronic: Retain for five years from receipt. ; Electronic: Permanently retain., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Electronic: Permanent
